segments.name: song_position_arrays_lo
segments.comment: Decoder scratch (lo): $11 markers on disk; $CF42 rewrites to runtime pointers $5F00 + X*$0F. $1800..$1825 below LOAD dest_floor — those 38 bytes are no-ops on real LOAD. Not sidTAB data (which is at $5F00).

segments.name: song_position_arrays_hi
segments.comment: Decoder scratch (hi): paired with $1800; $CF42 transform target

segments.name: pat_base_lo
segments.comment: Pattern base address (lo byte) per pattern number; $80 bytes = 128 patterns

segments.name: pat_base_hi
segments.comment: Pattern base address (hi byte) per pattern number; pairs with pat_base_lo

segments.name: arranger_v0_sid1
segments.comment: SID#1 V0 arranger column: pat_num per song row (256 rows max)

segments.name: pattern_bank
segments.comment: Pattern data bank: per-pattern $80-byte block, indexed via pat_base_{lo,hi}; within a pattern, 4-byte step row = (flag, slot_a, slot_b, note). flag bits: 7=ALT, 6=GATE_A, 5=GATE_B, 4=GATE_N (must be set to play note), 3-0=duration

fields.name: flag
fields.comment: bit 7=ALT, 6=GATE_A, 5=GATE_B, 4=GATE_N (must be set to play the note), 3..0=dur nibble fed to the row timer

fields.name: slot_a
fields.comment: sidCALL1: row index into sidtab_data (env slot A)

fields.name: slot_b
fields.comment: sidCALL2: row index into sidtab_data (env slot B)

fields.name: note
fields.comment: note byte; pitch index into key_pitch_lut at $729A

segments.name: sidtab_data
segments.comment: Real sidTAB row data: 15-byte rows ($0F stride) per sidcall index. Rows 0..255 occupy $5F00..$6DFF; rows 256..313 occupy $6E00..$7166 which also overlaps the SID#2 arrangers when stereo is enabled.

fields.name: low_bitmap
fields.comment: bit 7=WGl, 6=WGh, 5=AD, 4=SR, 3=TR, 2=AF, 1=PW — present-bitmap for low-half columns; subsequent bytes 1..N decode in column-bit order. high_bitmap lives at byte 1+N (variable position).

segments.name: arranger_v3_sid2
segments.comment: SID#2 V3 arranger column (visible only when chip view = SID#2); overlays sidtab_data rows 192..207 — stereo tunes can't use both

segments.name: arranger_v4_sid2
segments.comment: SID#2 V4 arranger column; overlays sidtab_data rows 208..223

segments.name: arranger_v5_sid2
segments.comment: SID#2 V5 arranger column; overlays sidtab_data rows 224..239

segments.name: key_pitch_lut
segments.comment: Key-byte to base pitch LUT; reader at $AEB3 for note dispatch

segments.name: ram_under_io
segments.comment: RAM under I/O: defMON runs with $01=$35 to access this RAM region; static image preserves the boot-time bytes
